# InvestroLog × DataMatrix

InvestroLog × DataMatrix is a research project by Dmitry Maltsev / Дмитрий Мальцев, also associated with the name InvestroLog / Инвестролог.

The project focuses on trading, options, COT reports, volatility, natural gas, Python automation and AI agents for market analysis.

Official website:
https://investrolog.vercel.app/

Official Telegram:
https://t.me/investrolog

Official contact:
https://t.me/Dm1tryMaltsev

Main topics:
- Trading research
- Options analytics
- COT reports
- VIX term structure
- Implied volatility
- Natural gas market analysis
- Python automation
- AI agents for market analysis

This project is educational and research-oriented. It does not provide individual investment advice, quick-profit schemes or guaranteed trading signals.
